experiences.name: Anduril
experiences.title: Test Automation Engineer
experiences.desc:
• Developed hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) test systems for the Fury autonomous aircraft, enabling flight software validation through automated testing of landing gear, hydraulics, and sensor interface electronics.
    • Designed four 6-layer test interface PCBAs, a custom high-power test rack, and Python (PyVISA) / LabVIEW software to control instrumentation and inject test conditions for Ghost-X2 UAV electronics, including autonomy carrier board, power delivery board, AC/DC charger, OLEDs, and Electronic Speed Controller.

experiences.name: Tesla
experiences.title: Senior Systems Validation Engineer
experiences.desc:
• Led Tesla Remote Meter validation, focusing on tests including Modbus communications, power, voltage, current sweeps, and firmware integrity.
    • Verified system-level and component integrity of the new Tesla Remote Meter for inclusion in all Tesla residential systems, ensuring robust performance and compliance with IEEE, NEC, and local regulations.

experiences.name: Marine Advanced Robotics
experiences.title: Electrical Controls Engineer
experiences.desc:
• Directed the electrical controls production and design for 8’, 16’, and 22’ WAM-V robots as the sole electrical engineer.
    • Saved over $150,000 in manufacturing by leading outsourcing of all PCBA production and shifting to SMD components.
    • Administered integration of new sensors, radios, sonars, and additional equipment to broaden the operation capabilities.
  • Designed PCBAs with Eagle, LTSpice, and KiCad, and managed bench validation efforts with automated solutions.
    • Motor control board, power board, motherboard, relay board, follow box, and battery isolation designs for enhanced control.
    • Developed an automated PCBA testing platform utilizing Python to control oscilloscopes and electronic load sources.

experiences.name: RMF Engineering
experiences.title: Electrical Design Engineer
experiences.desc:
• Managed critical infrastructure projects that significantly enhanced system reliability and performance across various institutions.
    • Led the 80% expansion of Buckley Air Force Base Data Center with a sophisticated UPS and Generator System to ensure uninterrupted power supply.
    • Developed a sequence of operations for UMBC's utility, generator, and switchgear to enhance reliability and mitigate failures.
    • Verified ladder-logic switchgear operation at Harvard University, ensuring seamless functionality and compliance with safety standards.
  • Directed project scopes from development through implementation, focusing on critical power systems and synchronizing multi-disciplinary teams.

experiences.name: Constellation Nuclear Power - Calvert Cliffs
experiences.title: Electrical Design Engineer
experiences.desc:
• Developed machine-learning Citrix application for Cable management, design, and testing
    • Directed data acqusisiton team by filtering cable criticality analysis by location, equipment attributes, operation, stressors, and priority
    • Formulated adverse environment calculations and priority ranking matrix for over 100,000 plant cables
    • Saved over $100,000 in maintenance testing, cable management, and environmental qualification costs
  • Spearheaded 450HP Salt Water Motor Pump, control, and 5kV Power Supply re-design
    • Bolstered safety mechanisms, output efficiency, and testing strategy of vital heat sink Salt Water System
    • Scoped and administered work orders for ovation embedded control design with PLC ladder-logic
  • Designed over 15 engineering change packages for mechanical and electrical plant systems, equipment, documents, and components
    • Prepared extensive temporary and permanent design changes for systems, including control room modifications, and ensure technical issues resolved
    • Troubleshoot complex problems, including a digital change to AVR microcontroller on plant trip from Reactor Coolant Pumps
    • Control Room HVAC modification for improved response time to gas and smoke signals
  • Composed audit responses from internal and external NRC, NOS, INPO and DBAI programs
    • Presented Cable Management Program enhancements and gaps
    • Utilized OPEX, Corrective Actions, Quality Assurance, and systems data for analyses with plant safety and reliability prioritized

experiences.name: Exelon Nuclear Power - LaSalle
experiences.title: Electrical Systems Intern
experiences.desc:
• Scoped and enhanced electrical systems engineering database on critical station safety-related 480V transformers
    • Collated specs, preventative maintenance, and work orders on systems utilizing Passport application
    • Organized turns ratio, insulation resistance, and Doble power factor testing for over 40 480V transformers onsite
    • Classified SBM switch safety mechanisms for 5 Emergency Diesel Generators

experiences.name: Purdue University Engineering
experiences.title: Undergraduate Teaching Assistant
experiences.desc:
• Trained sophomore level electrical engineering laboratory and classroom skills for circuit design
    • Educated oscilloscope, function generator, DMM, voltmeter, and ammeter application
    • Demonstrated MATLAB SCPI commands and troubleshoot students code for satisfactory performance
    • Graded students projects including audio amplifier, AC bridge, and full wave rectifier
  • Organized office hours for responding to students questions and concerns
  • Supervised lab practical midterm and final exam
